title: The Real Reason Giordano Bruno Was Burned at the Stake - Ada Palmer
summary: Ada Palmer presents an interpretation of the historical reasons behind Giordano Bruno's execution by the Inquisition. The discussion examines the actual circumstances and motivations behind Bruno's 1600 burning at the stake.
writeup: Historian Ada Palmer joins Dwarkesh Patel to reexamine why Giordano Bruno was burned at the stake, separating the historical record from the conventional narrative that frames his execution. The conversation focuses on the actual reasons behind his fate rather than the popular account. The summary does not specify which charges or causes Palmer identifies.
